hero.headline: Transform How You Learn with AI
hero.subheadline: Upload any content—PDFs, videos, articles—and generate flashcards, quizzes, mind maps, and more. Perfect for students, researchers, and lifelong learners.

features.chat: Ask questions using your notebook sources
features.deepResearch: Multi-step research with web and notebook sources
features.literatureReview: Screen papers and draft synthesis reports
features.audio: Audio recaps from your study material
features.mindmap: Visual maps of concepts from your sources
features.reports: Study guides and report drafts on demand

contentShowcase.title: Upload Anything, Learn Everything

featuresGrid.heading: Powerful Learning Tools

footer.tagline: SolomindLM is an AI learning and research assistant that helps you work with PDFs, videos, and papers—flashcards, quizzes, reports, chat, and more, starting from the material you upload.

useCases.heading: Built for Every Learner
useCases.subtitle: From students to professionals, SolomindLM adapts to your learning style

medicalStudents.title: Medical Students
medicalStudents.description: Turn dense lectures and research papers into memorizable flashcards and quizzes.
medicalStudents.example: Upload an anatomy lecture → Generate a flashcard draft to review

researchers.title: Researchers
researchers.description: Work through literature review mode with papers in your notebook.
researchers.example: Upload research papers → Screen sources and draft a synthesis report

languageLearners.title: Language Learners
languageLearners.description: Create vocabulary lists and grammar exercises from any content.
languageLearners.example: Upload a Spanish article → Generate a practice quiz draft

professionals.title: Professionals
professionals.description: Summarize industry reports and stay updated with minimal reading time.
professionals.example: Upload a market report → Get executive summary and key insights

lifelongLearners.title: Lifelong Learners
lifelongLearners.description: Turn any topic into a structured learning experience.
lifelongLearners.example: Upload a philosophy book → Practice with written questions and feedback

studyGroups.title: Study Groups
studyGroups.description: Share a notebook so others can collaborate on the same sources.
studyGroups.example: Share a notebook link → Cowork on sources and Studio outputs
